org.docgene.model

Class HTMLNode.Empty

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.HTMLNode.Empty
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HTMLElement, HTMLNode
    Enclosing interface:
    HTMLNode

    public static class HTMLNode.Empty
extends java.lang.Object
implements HTMLNode
    The empty node, used for not allowed html tags.
    Since:
    1.5.6.1

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.docgene.model.HTMLNode

        HTMLNode.Default, HTMLNode.Empty
